headline: Chip selloff creates multi-measure oversold in SOXX/MU/MRVL; oil/gold war-premium unwind nearing completion; defense (ITA/LMT) stretched overbought on NATO/Iran premium; VXX at 52-wk low — no vol fade today.
Iran de-escalation drains war premium — energy & AI sell-off create oversold setups; defense & gold overbought fade in progress; VIX calm at ~16.
Energy, silver, bonds & bitcoin are deeply oversold post-Iran ceasefire & Warsh shock — but today's NFP can flip every thesis; semis & PANW overbought after historic H1 run.
Iran-war crowded trades unwinding: fade defense & gold spikes, accumulate crushed airlines & consumer names — vol is calm, no VXX spike to fade.
Energy & gold meltdown dominates oversold list; AI semiconductor parabola is the overbought landmine — two giant unwinds running simultaneously.
